rationale: The cited paper appears directly relevant to the citing paper’s core literature base: both study long-term marketing/promotion effects using scanner data in CPG settings, and the cited work specifically estimates permanent/cumulative promotion effects across brands. The citing note says it extends prior long-term work that focused mainly on advertising and promotion, which matches the cited paper’s promotion-centered scope, so this is plausibly a substantive theory/mechanism/comparison reference rather than an incidental mention.
